plot outline: Four members of a high school band called Mystery do everything they can to attend a KISS concert in Detroit. In order to make it to the show they must steal, cheat, strip, deal with an anti-rock mom and generally do whatever it takes to see the band that has inspired them to be musicians.
title: Detroit Rock City

other companies.name: Alliance of Canadian Cinema, Television and Radio Artists (ACTRA)
International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
